dependencies.description:
CUDA is a parallel computing platform and programming model invented by
NVIDIA. It enables dramatic increases in computing performance by
harnessing the power of the graphics processing unit (GPU). Note: This
package does not currently install the drivers necessary to run CUDA.
These will need to be installed manually. See:
https://docs.nvidia.com/cuda/ for details.
dependencies.name: cuda

dependencies.description:
ModelAngelo is an automatic atomic model building program for cryo-EM
maps.
dependencies.name: model-angelo

dependencies.description:
A distributed collaborative effort to develop Python libraries and
applications which address the needs of current and future work in
bioinformatics.
dependencies.name: py-biopython

dependencies.description: Python composable command line interface toolkit.
dependencies.name: py-click

dependencies.description: Serialize all of python
dependencies.name: py-dill

dependencies.description:
Flexible and powerful tensor operations for readable and reliable code.
Supports numpy, pytorch, tensorflow, and others.
dependencies.name: py-einops

dependencies.description: Fast hierarchical clustering routines for R and Python.
dependencies.name: py-fastcluster

dependencies.description: A lightweight Python API for AreTomo.
dependencies.name: py-lil-aretomo

dependencies.description: Loguru is a library which aims to bring enjoyable logging in Python.
dependencies.name: py-loguru

dependencies.description: A fast LRU cache
dependencies.name: py-lru-dict

dependencies.description:
makefun helps you create functions dynamically, with the signature of
your choice. It was largely inspired by decorator and functools, and
created mainly to cover some of their limitations.
dependencies.name: py-makefun

dependencies.description:
Matplotlib is a comprehensive library for creating static, animated, and
interactive visualizations in Python.
dependencies.name: py-matplotlib

dependencies.description: mdocfile is Python package for working with SerialEM mdoc files.
dependencies.name: py-mdocfile

dependencies.description:
Python implementation of the MRC2014 file format, which is used in
structural biology to store image and volume data.
dependencies.name: py-mrcfile

dependencies.description:
napari is a fast, interactive, multi-dimensional image viewer for
Python. It's designed for browsing, annotating, and analyzing large
multi-dimensional images. It's built on top of Qt (for the GUI), vispy
(for performant GPU-based rendering), and the scientific Python stack
(numpy, scipy).
dependencies.name: py-napari

dependencies.description: Fundamental package for array computing in Python.
dependencies.name: py-numpy

dependencies.description: The PyPA recommended tool for installing Python packages.
dependencies.name: py-pip

dependencies.description: Data validation and settings management using Python type hinting.
dependencies.name: py-pydantic

dependencies.description:
PyQt is a set of Python v2 and v3 bindings for The Qt Company's Qt
application framework and runs on all platforms supported by Qt
including Windows, OS X, Linux, iOS and Android. PyQt5 supports Qt v5.
dependencies.name: py-pyqt5

dependencies.description: Blush Refinement for Relion.
dependencies.name: py-relion-blush

dependencies.description:
The class ranker is part of the cryogenic electron microscopy (cryo-EM)
dataset processing pipeline in RELION. It is used to automatically
select suitable particles (EM images) assigned to 2D class averages for
further downstream processing.
dependencies.name: py-relion-classranker

dependencies.description:
Rich is a Python library for rich text and beautiful formatting in the
terminal.
dependencies.name: py-rich

dependencies.description: A set of python modules for machine learning and data mining.
dependencies.name: py-scikit-learn

dependencies.description:
Seaborn: statistical data visualization. Seaborn is a library for making
attractive and informative statistical graphics in Python. It is built
on top of matplotlib and tightly integrated with the PyData stack,
including support for numpy and pandas data structures and statistical
routines from scipy and statsmodels.
dependencies.name: py-seaborn

dependencies.description:
A Python utility that aids in the process of downloading, building,
upgrading, installing, and uninstalling Python packages.
dependencies.name: py-setuptools

dependencies.description: The blessed package to manage your versions by scm tags.
dependencies.name: py-setuptools-scm

dependencies.description:
starfile is a package for reading and writing STAR files in Python.
starfile can be used interactively to inspect/explore files or in
scripts and larger software packages to provide basic STAR file I/O
functions. Data is exposed as simple python dictionaries or pandas
dataframes. This package was designed principally for compatibility with
files generated by RELION.
dependencies.name: py-starfile

dependencies.description:
Tensors and Dynamic neural networks in Python with strong GPU
acceleration.
dependencies.name: py-torch

dependencies.description: Image and video datasets and models for torch deep learning.
dependencies.name: py-torchvision

dependencies.description: A Fast, Extensible Progress Meter
dependencies.name: py-tqdm

dependencies.description: Typer, build great CLIs. Easy to code. Based on Python type hints.
dependencies.name: py-typer

dependencies.description:
Uniform Manifold Approximation and Projection (UMAP) is a dimension
reduction technique that can be used for visualisation similarly to
t-SNE, but also for general non-linear dimension reduction.
dependencies.name: py-umap-learn

dependencies.description: A built-package format for Python.
dependencies.name: py-wheel

dependencies.description: The Python programming language.
dependencies.name: python

dependencies.description: A Spack managed Python virtual environment
dependencies.name: python-venv

dependencies.description:
topaz: Pipeline for particle picking in cryo-electron microscopy images
using convolutional neural networks trained from positive and unlabeled
examples. Also featuring micrograph and tomogram denoising with DNNs.
dependencies.name: topaz-3dem

dependencies.description:
tsne-cuda is an optimized CUDA version of FIt-SNE algorithm with
associated python modules. Authors find that their implementation of
t-SNE can be up to 1200x faster than Sklearn, or up to 50x faster than
Multicore-TSNE when used with the right GPU.
dependencies.name: tsne-cuda

dependent_to.description:
RELION (for REgularised LIkelihood OptimisatioN, pronounce rely-on) is a
stand-alone computer program that employs an empirical Bayesian approach
to refinement of (multiple) 3D reconstructions or 2D class averages in
electron cryo-microscopy (cryo-EM).
dependent_to.name: relion

description:
This is a helper package for relion, not to be used by end-users. relion
(for REgularised LIkelihood OptimisatioN, pronounce rely-on) is a
software package that employs an empirical Bayesian approach for
electron cryo-microscopy (cryo-EM) structure determination.
name: py-relion

variants.description: Build systems supported by the package
variants.name: build_system
